title: Storybook Mirror Adventure Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Storybook Mirror Adventure Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image whimsical storybook mirror adventure illustration for a user-owned outdoor convex traffic mirror photo with a playful person pose, preserving the person, road, utility pole, mirror, and tropical greenery from the uploaded photo. Subject: the person, road, utility pole, mirror, and tropical greenery from the uploaded photo becomes a cute cartoon adventurer wearing a white t-shirt, navy shorts, white socks, and a blue cap, posed playfully inside the convex mirror reflection. Scene: The source road, utility pole, convex traffic mirror, and tropical greenery stay recognizable while the mirror reflection becomes lush jungle plants, palm trees, flowers, butterflies, doodle hearts, stars, swirls, smiling sun, fluffy clouds, and colorful decorations. Composition: Preserve the uploaded photo pose, perspective, convex mirror placement, road geometry, utility pole, and surrounding greenery as the fixed structure. Style: Whimsical hand-painted storybook illustration with textured gouache paint, clean outlines, kawaii travel-journal charm, cheerful editorial finish, and highly detailed foliage. Color Palette: Fixed bright pastel greens, oranges, blues, and pinks with cozy tropical warmth and playful children-book color harmony. Typography: Day 53, 4.06 km, 88 m, 24 min 9 sec appear inside the mirror as charming readable fitness-tracker infographic labels integrated into the illustration. Signature Elements: Convex mirror reflection, tropical greenery, cute cartoon transformation, doodle hearts, stars, flowers, smiling sun, tracker stats, and gouache storybook texture. Reference Image Policy: Use a user-owned or consented source photo to preserve exact pose, convex traffic mirror reflection, perspective, road, utility pole, and greenery. Source Image Recipe: One vertical outdoor photo with a visible convex traffic mirror and person pose is required before local image-to-image generation. Restrictions: Keep the mirror structure readable, stats legible, pose consistent, mood cheerful, outlines clean, and image watermark-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
